description: Vehicle stats base pointer (deref to stats array)
Blooper ink speed penalty (No Blooper Effect)
Item data pointer (base for item hacks, Volderbeek)
Player state pointer (base for item/boost hacks)
Bullet Bill icon (No Lasting BB Icon)
Always Have Item pointer (dexter0, works anywhere)
State flags (bit0=in race, bit2=wrong way, bit5=dc)
